diagrams.title: 2D Affine Transformation Matrix Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the 3×3 homogeneous matrix with labeled sections for rotation/scaling/shearing and translation
diagrams.purpose: Understand matrix composition and element roles

diagrams.title: Translation Effect on Point
diagrams.description: Original point P(x,y) moving to P'(x',y') after translation by (tx,ty)

diagrams.title: Rotation About Origin
diagrams.description: Point rotating counterclockwise by angle θ around origin

diagrams.title: Scaling Transformation
diagrams.description: Original rectangle being scaled - show uniform vs non-uniform scaling
diagrams.purpose: Compare uniform scaling (sx=sy) with non-uniform scaling

diagrams.title: Shearing Visualization
diagrams.description: Rectangle being sheared along X-axis and Y-axis
diagrams.purpose: Understand shearing distorts shape but preserves parallelism

diagrams.title: Reflection Types
diagrams.description: Three reflection cases: about X-axis, Y-axis, and line y=x
diagrams.purpose: Visualize reflection as coordinate negation and swapping
